items.title: CNBC Daily Open: Dispatch from NATO, U.S. strikes Iran and Le Pen is back
items.description: Tensions between the U.S. and its allies heat up at the NATO Summit, while a fresh wave of stikes threatens the ceasefire in Iran.

items.title: Apple begins testing CXMT chips for devices sold in China, FT says
Lawmakers probe growing use of Chinese AI models in U.S. companies
items.description: An ongoing House Committee investigation is probing the risks involved in the rise of AI built in China.

items.title: U.S. completes strikes on multiple Iranian targets after Hormuz Strait ship attacks, Centcom says
items.description: The U.S. revoked Iran oil sales authorization earlier in the day.

items.title: Chinese autonomous-driving firm Momenta rises 3% in Hong Kong stock debut
items.description: Chinese autonomous driving firm Momenta debuted on the Hong Kong stock exchange on Wednesday, rising 3%.

items.title: Oil jumps as U.S. 'powerful strikes' against Iran risk unraveling fragile Mideast truce
items.description: Oil prices rose on Wednesday after the U.S. launched fresh strikes on Iran in retaliation for attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: China's rare missile test will push wary Asia-Pacific countries to close ranks, analysts say
items.description: China's rare launch of a ballistic missile launch into the Pacific will push regional powers to deepen their defense ties.

items.title: Netflix, Disney and YouTube interested in FIFA World Cup U.S. rights; package could reach $2 billion
items.description: FIFA has alerted media companies that English- and Spanish-language U.S. rights are likely to be sold together for 2030 and 2034, likely driving up the price.

items.title: Kalshi traders see slim odds U.S. government will take a stake in OpenAI this year
items.description: Traders on the prediction markets platform see a less than 30% likelihood the federal government will take a stake in AI companies Anthropic and OpenAI.

items.title: Jim Cramer says the market's reaction to Samsung may signal a shift in AI leadership
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said Samsung's earnings sparked a sell-off in AI hardware stocks, while many tech names that have lagged this year rebounded.

items.title: Judge blocks DOJ subpoena for names of 2020 Fulton County, Georgia, election workers
items.description: President Donald Trump has focused on the ballot count in Fulton County, Georgia, to promote claims that he actually won the 2020 election

items.title: U.S. revokes Iran oil sales authorization after tanker attacks
items.description: Treasury had waived sanctions on Iranian oil through Aug. 21 after Washington and Tehran inked an interim deal to reopen Hormuz last month.

items.title: Traders on Kalshi think the Nasdaq-100 will end 2026 above 30,000, predicting a cooler second half of the year
items.description: Speculators think the massive rally in the Nasdaq-100 since the lows following the U.S.-Iran war will be more subdued in the second half of 2026.

items.title: DeSantis-backed 'Stop WOKE' law meets appeals court block, teeing up possible Supreme Court fight
items.description: A Trump-appointed judge ruled against Gov. Ron DeSantis' "Stop WOKE Act," leaving Florida’s college speech limits blocked as a Supreme Court appeal looms.

items.title: Maine Senate race replacements circle amid pressure on Platner to drop out
items.description: Democrat Graham Platner has denied allegations of sexual assault leveled by Maine resident Jenny Racicot as calls for him to exit the pivotal race mount.

items.title: Chip stocks sell off after Samsung earnings fall short of high AI bar
items.description: Samsung Electronics' results weren't enough to please investors after stock's 145% run up

items.title: Strait of Hormuz threat level raised to 'severe' after Iran attacks tankers using U.S. Navy route
items.description: Iran's military has warned it will target ships that do not use a northern route approved by Tehran.

items.title: Rivian stock falls 18% as company sells 75 million shares to raise capital
items.description: The capital raise occurred during extended hours trading following Rivian shares increasing 8.1% on Monday after increasing 19.2% last week.

items.title: Mitch McConnell's health concerns grow amid 4th week in hospital with few details from aides
items.description: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to the hospital on June 14.

items.title: As chip sector takes it on the chin, traders bet on a big Nvidia rally
items.description: Shares of Nvidia fought into the green despite a 5% sell-off in chip stocks tracked by the VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH).
